title: Truly Random Mob Drops
description: Any mob may drop any item, truly.
body:
# Truly Random Mob Drops
This is a **datapack** that replaces the loot table of **every mob** to a pool of **every item** available in the game. A truly random mob drop experience. **No limits**.

- This datapack is currently only focused on 1.20.1. 
- It won't work on lower versions as the loot table has items that don't exist in lower versions.
- It may work on newer versions but it will miss newer items, or it may simply won't work as data packs change their format.
